properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You're more real than The ground I'm standing on, You're more real than The wind in my lungs.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Your thoughts define me, You're inside me, You're my reality

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You're closer than The skin on my bones, You're closer than The song on my tongue.
